name: BUILD FAST inv1
BUILD SLOW inv1
MODBUS REQ inv1
PARSE inv1
MERGE inv 1
BUILD FAST inv2
BUILD SLOW inv2
MODBUS REQ inv2
PARSE inv2
MERGE inv 2
BUILD FAST inv3
BUILD SLOW inv3
MODBUS REQ inv3
PARSE inv3
MERGE inv 3
BUILD DISCOVERY
func:
const prefix = "homeassistant";
const basePrefix = "sofar";

const entities = [
  {
    key: "diag_inverter_state",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Inverter state",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.diag.inverter_state }}",
    entity_category: "diagnostic",
    icon: "mdi:information-outline"
  },
  {
    key: "diag_fault_state",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Fault state",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.diag.fault_state }}",
    entity_category: "diagnostic",
    icon: "mdi:alert-circle-outline"
  },
  {
    key: "diag_fault_count",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Fault count",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.diag.fault_count }}",
    entity_category: "diagnostic",
    icon: "mdi:counter"
  },

  {
    key: "pv1_input_voltage",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "PV1 input voltage",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.pv1_input_voltage }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "V",
    device_class: "voltage",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "pv1_input_current",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "PV1 input current",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.pv1_input_current }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "A",
    device_class: "current",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "pv1_input_power",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "PV1 input power",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.pv1_input_power }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "W",
    device_class: "power",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "pv2_input_voltage",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "PV2 input voltage",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.pv2_input_voltage }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "V",
    device_class: "voltage",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "pv2_input_current",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "PV2 input current",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.pv2_input_current }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "A",
    device_class: "current",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "pv2_input_power",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "PV2 input power",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.pv2_input_power }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "W",
    device_class: "power",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "pv_total_power",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "PV total power",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.pv_total_power }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "W",
    device_class: "power",
    state_class: "measurement",
    icon: "mdi:solar-power"
  },

  {
    key: "grid_frequency",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Grid frequency",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.grid_frequency }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "Hz",
    device_class: "frequency",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "grid_power",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Grid power",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.grid_power }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "W",
    device_class: "power",
    state_class: "measurement",
    icon: "mdi:transmission-tower"
  },
  {
    key: "production_instantanee",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Instant production",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.production_instantanee }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "W",
    device_class: "power",
    state_class: "measurement",
    icon: "mdi:flash"
  },
  {
    key: "ac_output_voltage",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "AC output voltage",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.ac_output_voltage }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "V",
    device_class: "voltage",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "ac_output_current",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "AC output current",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.ac_output_current }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "A",
    device_class: "current",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "load_power",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Load power",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.load_power }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "W",
    device_class: "power",
    state_class: "measurement",
    icon: "mdi:home-lightning-bolt-outline"
  },

  {
    key: "battery_voltage",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Battery voltage",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.battery_voltage }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "V",
    device_class: "voltage",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "battery_current",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Battery current",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.battery_current }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "A",
    device_class: "current",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "battery_power",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Battery power",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.battery_power }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "W",
    device_class: "power",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "battery_temperature",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Battery temperature",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.battery_temperature }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "°C",
    device_class: "temperature",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "battery_soc",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Battery SOC",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.battery_soc }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "%",
    device_class: "battery",
    state_class: "measurement"
  },
  {
    key: "battery_soh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Battery SOH",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.battery_soh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "%",
    state_class: "measurement",
    icon: "mdi:battery-heart-outline"
  },
  {
    key: "battery_cycles",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Battery cycles",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.battery_cycles }}",
    state_class: "measurement",
    icon: "mdi:battery-sync-outline"
  },

  {
    key: "pv_energy_day_kwh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "PV energy day",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.pv_energy_day_kwh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "kWh",
    device_class: "energy",
    state_class: "total_increasing"
  },
  {
    key: "pv_energy_total_kwh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "PV energy total",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.pv_energy_total_kwh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "kWh",
    device_class: "energy",
    state_class: "total_increasing"
  },
  {
    key: "load_energy_day_kwh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Load energy day",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.load_energy_day_kwh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "kWh",
    device_class: "energy",
    state_class: "total_increasing"
  },
  {
    key: "load_energy_total_kwh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Load energy total",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.load_energy_total_kwh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "kWh",
    device_class: "energy",
    state_class: "total_increasing"
  },
  {
    key: "grid_import_day_kwh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Grid import day",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.grid_import_day_kwh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "kWh",
    device_class: "energy",
    state_class: "total_increasing"
  },
  {
    key: "grid_import_total_kwh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Grid import total",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.grid_import_total_kwh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "kWh",
    device_class: "energy",
    state_class: "total_increasing"
  },
  {
    key: "grid_export_day_kwh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Grid export day",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.grid_export_day_kwh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "kWh",
    device_class: "energy",
    state_class: "total_increasing"
  },
  {
    key: "grid_export_total_kwh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Grid export total",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.grid_export_total_kwh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "kWh",
    device_class: "energy",
    state_class: "total_increasing"
  },
  {
    key: "battery_charge_day_kwh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Battery charge day",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.battery_charge_day_kwh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "kWh",
    device_class: "energy",
    state_class: "total_increasing"
  },
  {
    key: "battery_discharge_day_kwh",
    domain: "sensor",
    name: "Battery discharge day",
    value_template: "{{ value_json.battery_discharge_day_kwh }}",
    unit_of_measurement: "kWh",
    device_class: "energy",
    state_class: "total_increasing"
  }
];

const payloads = [];

for (let inv = 1; inv <= 3; inv++) {
  const device = {
    identifiers: [`sofar_inv_${inv}`],
    name: `Smart Sofar Inverter ${inv}`,
    manufacturer: "Sofar Solar",
    model: "HYD6000EP"
  };

  const stateTopic = `${basePrefix}/${inv}/state`;
  const availTopic = `${basePrefix}/${inv}/availability`;

  for (const e of entities) {
    const config = {
      name: `Sofar inv${inv} ${e.name}`,
      unique_id: `sofar_inv${inv}_${e.key}`,
      object_id: `sofar_inv${inv}_${e.key}`,
      state_topic: stateTopic,
      availability_topic: availTopic,
      value_template: e.value_template,
      device: device
    };

    if (e.unit_of_measurement) config.unit_of_measurement = e.unit_of_measurement;
    if (e.device_class) config.device_class = e.device_class;
    if (e.state_class) config.state_class = e.state_class;
    if (e.entity_category) config.entity_category = e.entity_category;
    if (e.icon) config.icon = e.icon;

    payloads.push({
      topic: `${prefix}/${e.domain}/sofar_inv${inv}/${e.key}/config`,
      payload: JSON.stringify(config)
    });
  }
}

msg.payload = payloads;
return msg;
